Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start &CopiarFavoritos.Title = 'Favoritos' &ConfAcesso.Title = 'Perfil' &AdicionarSenha.Title = 'Senha' &FilaisAcesso.Title = 'Filial' &Widgets.Title = 'Widgets' &CriarUsuario.Title = 'Editar' &DeletaUsuario.Title = 'Deletar' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCADASTROUSUARIOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &ActiveSessionCount = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PesExtCod = 'U' DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Monitora Usuários' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'AtualizaTotaisUsuarios' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CriarUsuario = !'' &DeletaUsuario = !'' If (PesExtCod > 0) &DeletaUsuario.Class = !'Attribute' Else &DeletaUsuario.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &AdicionarSenha = !'' &ConfAcesso = !'' &FilaisAcesso = !'' &CopiarFavoritos = !'' If (PesSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &CopiarFavoritos.Class = !'Attribute' Else &CopiarFavoritos.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &Widgets = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('wwCadastroUsuarios', EmpCod, PesCod) &gridStatusUsuario = 'SEM USUARIO' &gridStatusUsuario.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &AuxPesExtCod = PesExtCod &gridGUID = '' &gridPesEml = '' &gridNomeUsuario = '' If &AuxPesExtCod <> 0 do 'getUsuariosGAM' endIf If &gridGUID <> '' &AdicionarSenha.Visible = 1 &ConfAcesso.Visible = 1 &CopiarFavoritos.Visible = 1 &FilaisAcesso.Visible = 1 &Widgets.Visible = 1 Else &AdicionarSenha.Visible = 0 &ConfAcesso.Visible = 0 &CopiarFavoritos.Visible = 0 &FilaisAcesso.Visible = 0 &Widgets.Visible = 0 EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &CopiarFavoritos.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpCopiaFavoritosUsuario.PopUp(EmpCod, PesCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz1.Visible = False &FltPesExtCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' &FltPesExtCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz2.Visible = False &FltPesExtCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' &FltPesExtCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz3.Visible = False &FltPesExtCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' &FltPesExtCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESEXTCOD" &PesExtCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' &FltPesExtCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESEXTCOD", "", true, 0, &PesExtCod, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' AND not &FltPesExtCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FltPesExtCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' AND not &FltPesExtCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FltPesExtCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FLTPESEXTCOD' AND not &FltPesExtCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FltPesExtCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"CadastroUsuarios" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &CriarUsuario.Click If &gridGUID.IsEmpty() NovoUsuario.Popup(TrnMode.Insert, '', EmpCod, PesCod) Else NovoUsuario.Popup(TrnMode.Update, &gridGUID, EmpCod, PesCod) EndIf wwCadastroUsuarios.Link() EndEvent Event &ConfAcesso.Click wwPerfisUsuario.Popup(PesCod) EndEvent Event &AdicionarSenha.Click If not &gridGUID.IsEmpty() wpSetarNovaSenha.Popup(&gridGUID) Refresh Else msg('Pessoa não HABILITADO como Usuário!') EndIF EndEvent Event &DeletaUsuario.Click NovoUsuario.Popup(TrnMode.Delete, &gridGUID, EmpCod, PesCod) wwCadastroUsuarios.Link() EndEvent Event &FilaisAcesso.Click WpFilialAcesso.Popup(EmpCod, PesCod) EndEvent Event &Widgets.Click wpMeusWidgets.Popup(PesCod) EndEvent Sub 'getUsuariosGAM' &GAMUserFilter.AuthenticationTypeName = '' &GAMUserFilter.ReturnAnonymousUser = false &GAMUserFilter.ExternalId = trim(str(&AuxPesExtCod)) For &User in GAMRepository.GetUsersOrderBy(&GAMUserFilter, GAMUserListOrder.None, &Errors) &gridGUID = &User.GUID &gridPesEml = &User.EMail &gridNomeUsuario = &User.Name &DataHora = &User.DateLastAuthentication Do Case Case &User.IsBlocked = true &gridStatusUsuario.ForeColor = RGB(160,40,0) &gridStatusUsuario = 'BLOQUEADO' Case &User.IsActive = true &gridStatusUsuario.ForeColor = RGB(0,40,160) &gridStatusUsuario = 'ATIVO' Otherwise &gridStatusUsuario.ForeColor = RGB(160,40,0) &gridStatusUsuario = 'BLOQUEADO' EndCAse Exit EndFor //Recupera quantas sessões tem cada usuario &GamSessionLogFilter.UserGUID = &gridGUID &GamSessionLogFilter.Status = GamSessionStatus.Active &ColGamSessionLog = GAMRepository.GetSessionLogs(&GamSessionLogFilter,&GamErros) &GridQtdSession = &ColGamSessionLog.Count &ActiveSessionCount += &GridQtdSession EndSub Sub 'AtualizaTotaisUsuarios' &QtdMaximo = 0 For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &QtdMaximo = EmpQtdUsu Exit EndFor if &QtdMaximo > 0 &QtdAtivos = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where not PesExtCod.IsEmpty() and not PesExtCod.IsNull() &AuxPesExtCod = PesExtCod do 'getUsuariosGAMverifica' EndFor Endif EndSub Sub 'getUsuariosGAMverifica' &GAMUserFilter.AuthenticationTypeName = '' &GAMUserFilter.ReturnAnonymousUser = false &GAMUserFilter.ExternalId = trim(str(&AuxPesExtCod)) For &User in GAMRepository.GetUsersOrderBy(&GAMUserFilter, GAMUserListOrder.None, &Errors) If &User.IsActive = true and &User.IsBlocked <> true &QtdAtivos += 1 Endif Exit EndFor EndSub // //Event Card3.Click // // //DERRUBA TODAS AS SESSÕES DUPLICADAS, EXCETO DO USUÁRIO QUE INICIOU O KILL\\ // // &CountNumeric = 0 // // For each line // &GAMSessionLogFilter.UserGUID = &gridGUID // &GAMSessionLogFilter.status = GamSessionStatus.Active // For &GAMSessionLog in GAMRepository.GetSessionLogsOrderBy(&GAMSessionLogFilter, GAMSessionLogListOrder.Date_Desc, &Errors) // &Isok = GAMSessionLog.KillSession(&GAMSessionLog.token, &Errors) // if &isOK // commit // &CountNumeric += 1 // EndIf // // EndFor // EndFor // // // If &CountNumeric >= 1 // msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Sessões Finalizadas!", "O sistema obteve êxito ao encerrar as sessões. Sessões Encerradas: " + Trim(Str(&CountNumeric)) ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // Grid.Refresh() // Else // msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Nenhuma sessão finalizada!", "O sistema não finalizou nenhuma sessão." ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // EndIf // //EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
